title: PN Stock Skycorp Solar Group (PN, $2.13) was a top gainer for penny stocks yesterday, jumping +18.33% to $2.13 per share
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
A.I.dvisor analyzed 33 other stocks in the [Alternative Power Generation](https://tickeron.com/tags/all/Industry-AlternativePowerGeneration) Industry and found that 28 of them (83.33%) are in an Uptrend while 6 of them (16.67%) are in a Downtrend.

# PN's RSI Indicator descending into oversold zone

The RSI Indicator for PN moved into overbought territory on September 05, 2025. Be on the watch for a price drop or consolidation in the future -- when this happens, think about selling the stock or exploring put options.
